subcodes.first_line: O thou whom God hath chosen from amidst all peoples for supreme guidance and the most glorious gift! Verily, We were in [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من اختاره الله من بین الوری للهدایه الکبری و الموهبه العظمی لقد کنا فی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @thankfulness; gratitude, @praise and encouragement, @prayer for service
